prompt: Write a Python script that: (1) fetches all spike protein sequences for betacoronaviruses (SARS-CoV-2, SARS-CoV, MERS-CoV, HCoV-OC43, HCoV-HKU1) from NCBI Protein using Biopython Entrez API, (2) performs multiple sequence alignment with MUSCLE via subprocess, (3) constructs a maximum-likelihood phylogenetic tree with IQ-TREE (GTR+G model), (4) annotates branches with bootstrap support values, (5) visualises the tree with ete3 or toytree, coloured by host species (bat, human, camel, rodent), (6) exports: aligned FASTA, Newick tree, and annotated tree PDF. Include logging, error handling for Entrez rate limits, and a requirements.txt.
source_citation: Derived from NCBI GenBank (2024_10); target: betacoronavirus spike protein; organism: Betacoronavirus; catalogue version v1.0
